purpose: Phase 12 Authority / Internal Link Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This data creates topic clusters, pillar pages, spoke routes, and source-bound internal linking paths for SEO and AI-search discovery.
rules: Every cluster needs one pillar route and multiple spoke routes.
Internal links should guide readers, not keyword-stuff pages.
AI-search pages need evidence, trust, maps, books, and funnel routes nearby.
Cluster pages must route to the Trust Center and Evidence Vault.
No cluster should turn symbolic commentary into factual accusation.
Authority is built by structure, source discipline, and clean navigation.

clusters.title: Elite Power Cluster
clusters.searchIntent: Who holds power, how influence works, and how to separate access from guilt.
questions: How does influence differ from control?

clusters.title: Intelligence / Surveillance Cluster
clusters.searchIntent: Agencies, surveillance, covert history, oversight, declassified records, and deep-state claims.
questions: How should declassified archives be read?

clusters.title: Crime-State Overlap Cluster
clusters.searchIntent: Cartels, mafia systems, sanctions, court records, underground banking, logistics, and corruption overlap.
questions: How do crime networks use finance?
What does a court record prove?
Where does corruption overlap with state power?

clusters.title: War Machine Cluster
clusters.searchIntent: War, contractors, procurement, intelligence claims, sanctions, and human cost.
questions: How do contractors fit into conflict?
How should human-cost figures be sourced?

clusters.title: Symbolic Power Cluster
clusters.searchIntent: Freemasonry, symbols, ritual architecture, esoteric interpretation, and evidence boundaries.
questions: How does esoteric interpretation differ from evidence?

clusters.title: Evidence / Trust Cluster
clusters.searchIntent: Source methodology, claim labels, corrections, privacy, evidence classes, and public-record discipline.
questions: What does a source actually prove?

clusters.title: Growth / Distribution Cluster
clusters.searchIntent: Reader paths, funnels, lead magnets, distribution formats, update monitoring, and content systems.
questions: Where should a new reader start?
Which book path fits the reader?
How does the archive become content?
How does the site stay fresh?
